ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT ELMER HERNANDEZ-AUSTURIAS ON JAN-08-2020 - CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2020 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. LISA B MEIER, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF SHERWIN WILLIAMS CO. DEFENDANT ELMER HERNANDEZ-ASTURIAS WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX WAS E-FILED ON 1/7/20, BUT DOES NOT APPEAR ON THE COURT'S DOCKET. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. THE PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE 2/5/20 EXAMINATION DATE. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT ELMER HERNANDEZ-ASTURIAS TO ASSIST HIM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

ORDER OF EXAMINATION FEB-05-2020 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO DEFENDANT ELMER HERNANDEZ-ASTURIAS, A/K/A ELMER HERNANDEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ASTRUIAS PAINTING. NO APPEARANCES. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. THE PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF TODAY'S EXAMINATION AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 1/8/20. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
